description: Your legal team has notified you that sales of laptops to California addresses are subject to a mandatory $12.50 E-Waste Recycling Fee. Configure the Magento store to charge this fee for customers in California when purchasing the 'Business Laptop Pro'. Enable the Fixed Product Tax (FPT) system and create a new product attribute with the code 'california_ewaste_fee', label 'CA E-Waste Fee', and 'Fixed Product Tax' input type. Assign this attribute to the 'Default Attribute Set' and apply a $12.50 tax rule for California (US) to the 'Business Laptop Pro' product. If not logged in, use credentials: admin / Admin1234!
